data.content: Needs changes: the take-loop implementation in src/lib/terminal-manager.ts now computes review-aware wrapping, but test coverage does not verify the regression path called out by the knot. Add a terminal-manager test that drives a single-beat take-loop into a review queue state (for example ready_for_implementation_review) and asserts the follow-up prompt/logged prompt contains the review preamble and excludes the implementation-biased preamble. Sanity gates in review worktree: targeted tests passed; full tsc/test/build passed; lint exited successfully with existing warnings only.
